title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Ramky Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Ramky Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ramky Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ramky Group:
Ramky Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ramky Group!
